If the assistant suggests alternative colors because brown is not possible, you're open to purple as a second choice.

For the route from Belgrade to the supermarket you just want the fastest route. So navigation should be from current location --> Belgrade --> supermarket (open, fastest route). If the assistant asks if he should start the navigation or set up the multi-stop navigation, you confirm.
